auth_and_identity.details: Introduced FastAPI Security via HTTPBearer. Internal requests are now authenticated against token DB lookup.

internal_api_security.details: SQLite-backed /api/internal/* routes explicitly reject unauthenticated access ensuring AI Node sidecar callbacks don't leak logic publicly.

multi_user_safety.details: User execution isolation established. Target user identities stream strictly from JWT claims in FastAPI header to FreeAI Python payload context explicitly avoiding parameter injection leakage.

runtime_supervision.details: Dual-node application maintains health aggregation boundaries via Python sidecar probing mechanism.
